candidates.why: Exact match to total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than the explicit total line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred for CHE.
Also a direct cash and cash equivalents line, likely a duplicated standardized total.
Includes short-term investments, broader than pure cash equivalents; less preferred.
Broader than pure cash equivalents because it may include short-term investments.

variables.notes: Prioritized pure cash-equivalents labels over broader cash and short-term investments labels.

candidates.why: Exact match to total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best match to current portion of debt while explicitly excluding leases, which the STD definition requires.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Broader current debt total but includes lease-related current portion via the linked including-capitalized-leases line; less preferred under baseline STD definition.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but may overlap with a cleaner reported current portion line.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a balance-sheet debt current portion line outside the shortlist because it explicitly excludes capitalized leases, matching the baseline STD definition better than the candidate total.

candidates.why: Direct match to current taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Includes long-term and short-term amounts together, so less precise than the short-term payable line.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this is a clear direct match to taxes payable.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE line; preferred for PPEGT versus gross or component lines.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also a total net PPE line, but the standard total PPE line is cleaner and more general.
Gross PPE exists, but net total is preferred when available.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE. Included the alternate net total as lower-priority backup.

candidates.why: Exact match to total assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match to net operating cash flow; preferred for OANCF.
Section/header style label rather than the numeric net cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than an intermediate subtotal.
